# Subash Limbu

> Yakthung/Limbu author and content creator in marketing since 2017. Author of "Tracing the
> Yakthung." Creator of Shall Explore and several faceless, AI-edited channels.

Subash Limbu is a content creator, author, and marketer of Yakthung/Limbu heritage, based across
Hong Kong, Kathmandu, and the UK. His ancestral roots are in the Meringden area of Taplejung,
eastern Nepal. In marketing since 2017, his work spans a travel and wildlife channel, several
faceless channels built on AI edits, a book on Limbu history, and a free personality quiz for the
Yakthung/Limbu community.

## Book

- Title: Tracing the Yakthung
- Author: Subash Limbu
- Length: 40 pages
- Subject: A practical guide to Yakthung/Limbu genealogy and history, covering the 10 Thum and
  29 Thum systems of Limbuwan, oral tradition carried through the Mundhum, what to ask elders
  before that knowledge is lost, and the most accurate Limbuwan map published to date
- Audience: Written especially for Limbus raised outside Nepal who want to reconnect with their
  history, culture, and identity
- Formats: Paperback via Amazon KDP ($26), PDF via Gumroad, distributed in Nepal via Thuprai.com

## Yakthung Type Quiz

A free quiz for the Yakthung/Limbu community to discover which of four Yakthung types they are:
The Guardian of Mundhum, The Wanderer of Diaspora, The Bridge Builder, or The Festival Keeper.

- Quiz: https://yakthungtype.netlify.app/

## Limbu Clan Lineage Chart

A print-ready chart for mapping Limbu family lineage across four generations and seven clans,
built around how Limbu lineage actually works: the paternal clan name plus the separate clans
that married into the family through the mother's and grandmothers' lines.

- Purchase: https://shallexplore.gumroad.com/l/mylimbuclans

## Shall Explore

Shall Explore is Subash Limbu's travel, wildlife, and indigenous-heritage channel, focused on
eastern Nepal and the wider Himalaya. Content pillars: Himalayan wildlife documentation, Limbu/
Yakthung cultural and oral history, and Himalayan adventure and travel. Subash also runs several
faceless YouTube and TikTok channels built on AI-edited video content, outside the Shall Explore
brand.

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ShallExplore
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@tsubashlimbu
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/subillion

## Links

- Website: https://shallexplore.github.io/
- GitHub: https://github.com/shallexplore
